datapoints.description: Numeric result of the PromQL query
datapoints.name: value

description: Configurable PromQL DataSource that queries any Thanos endpoint. Device properties define named PromQL queries; Active Discovery creates an instance per query; Collection executes each query and stores the result.
technicalNotes: Queries Thanos/Prometheus PromQL HTTP API via LM Collector
name: Thanos_PromQL_Collector
